page_title_index: Hatopi Encyclopedia | Heartopia Fish, Bug & Bird Search Tool
meta_description: Unofficial Heartopia encyclopedia tool to search fish, bugs, and birds by location, weather, and time. See what's available right now. Sell price display included.
meta_description_foods: Full list of Heartopia recipes. Check ingredients, ingredient cost, sell price, and profit.
meta_description_garden: Heartopia crop and flower encyclopedia. Growth time, seed price, crossbreeding list, and notification support.
meta_description_pet: Heartopia pet food tracker. Keep track of what you've fed your dogs and cats.
meta_description_codes: List of active Heartopia gift codes. Check rewards and expiration dates.
meta_description_events: List of ongoing and upcoming Heartopia events and gacha info.
meta_description_faq: Frequently asked questions, requests, and bug fix status for Hatopi Encyclopedia.
page_header_subtitle: Displays creatures based on Heartopia's current weather and time
codes_page_subtitle: Tap a code to copy it
faq_page_subtitle: Frequently asked questions, requests, and bug fix status
garden_breeding_note: Crossbreeding happens every day at 6 AM. Place two of the same color next to each other to get a higher-rarity seed.
garden_notif_desc:
Normal: background notification at harvest time
Weeding: notifications at 3 weeding points plus harvest
garden_notif_permission_text: 🔔 Notification permission is required to receive background notifications
garden_notif_blocked_text:
🔕 Notifications are blocked.
Please allow notifications for this site in your device/browser settings, then press the button below.
garden_toast_still_blocked: Still blocked. Please check your settings
garden_help_body:
🌱 Normal Mode: one notification at harvest time
🌿 Weeding Mode: notifications for 3 weeding points plus harvest
🔔: shown on crops with notifications on
⭐️: ★5 check
🎖: Verified Master check

⚠️ Notes
Notifications may be off by up to 1 minute. In weeding mode, the first two notifications arrive around 'grow time ÷ 3', and the third arrives 1–2 minutes before harvest.
This notification feature only works when the site is added to your home screen, and requires notification permission.
Please also note the feature may be disabled suddenly if issues come up 🙇‍♂️
share_tweet_text:
Hatopi Encyclopedia completion rate {percent}%!
Certified Master: {authCount} species!
#Heartopia
#HatopiEncyclopedia
help_search_body: Search by creature name or location.
help_type_body: Switch between Fish, Bugs, and Birds.
help_mode_body:
· All currently appearing
· Current weather only
· Not appearing now
help_sort_body: Sort by encyclopedia order, level, or incomplete first.
help_star_body:
Tap the ○ button (top-right of card) to check.
Multi-select → bulk check is also available.
help_auth_body:
Tap the ○ button (bottom-right of card) to check.
Multi-select → bulk check is also available.
help_multi_body_1: The multi-select feature has a few steps — here's how it works:
help_multi_body_2: 1. Press Multi-select to enter multi-select mode.
help_multi_body_3: 2. Tap all the creatures you want to check.
help_multi_body_4: 3. When done tapping, press the Star-5 or Master bulk check button.
help_multi_body_5: 4. After bulk checking, press Multi-select again to exit.
help_multi_body_6: Note: Star-5 and Master cannot be checked at the same time.
help_meteor_body: Meteor showers are treated as sunny weather.
help_minimize_body: Collapse the top panel using the "−" button.
help_share_body:
Press the 📥 button to share.
Generates a simple image of your completion status.
help_contact_body:
You can contact us at the bottom of the page.
Completely anonymous submissions are available.
help_contact_note: (A Q&A page for answers is planned.)
help_notice_body:
This site saves your state when you close it.
Your previous state will be restored when you reopen it.
privacy_body: All data on this site is managed within your browser (LocalStorage) only and is never sent externally.
contact_form_label: Bug reports, feature requests, and feedback welcome
disclaimer: ※ This is an unofficial tool created by an individual. It is not affiliated with the official game.
